data.title: TRX Price to Rally? Justin Sun’s New Incentives to Boost Meme Coin Trading
data.description:
TRON TRX price may be on the verge of a rally following a bold new move by founder Justin Sun. Sun recently announced on his X account a package of incentives designed to jump-start activity in TRON’s meme coin ecosystem..
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/trx-price-to-rally-justin-suns-new-incentives-to-boost-meme-coin-trading/

data.title: Greeks.live: As quarterly delivery approaches, crypto options market makers bet that the short-term market will continue to consolidate
data.description: Greeks.live macro analyst Adam wrote that this week's crypto market transactions were relatively flat, the total amount of option delivery fell by nearly half, the short-term implied volatility dropped significantly, the short-term volatility of Bitcoin fell below 50%, and the short-term volatility of ETH fell back to around 60%. Cryptocurrencies are currently in a free oscillation sideways state, and investor sentiment is becoming sluggish. As the quarterly delivery approaches, large investors generally adopt a prudent strategy, and option market makers have re-increased their selling intensity, tightened implied volatility, and bet that the short-term market will continue to consolidate.

data.title: The number of active addresses on the Monad test network is approaching 35 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On-chain data shows that the number of active addresses on the Monad test network has reached nearly 35 million (34,466,675) so far.
Earlier, Monad co-founder Keone Hon said yesterday that the test network has resumed operation. In addition, the network has added 15 nodes, bringing the total number of nodes to 72. A few nodes are still not online, but should be restored soon. The team is working hard to improve the robustness of the network upgrade.

data.title: A whale withdrew 8,313 ETH from Binance after two months of dormancy
data.description: Onchain Lens monitoring shows that a whale withdrew 8,313 ETH worth $16.46 million from Binance after two months of dormancy. The whale currently holds 11,197.53 ETH worth $22.17 million, with a floating loss of $3.8 million.

data.title: Bad news Bitcoin bulls, the long-hoped-for retail is already here: CryptoQuant
data.description:
Bitcoin bulls who still think the cycle peak has yet to come as retail investors haven’t piled in yet might be using an outdated playbook, according to a crypto executive.
“The idea that the cycle isn’t over just because onchain retail activity is absent needs reconsideration,” CryptoQuant founder and CEO Ki Young Ju said in a March 19 X post. 
Ju said that those tracking retail movements using only onchain metrics will not have seen the full picture. 
“Retail is likely entering through ETFs — the paper Bitcoin layer — which doesn’t show up onchain,” Ju said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bulls-hoping-retail-investors-surprise-cryptoquant-ceo?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Multiple newly created addresses have withdrawn a total of 61.52 million OM from Binance in the past four days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Spot On Chain monitoring shows that in the past 4 days, 19 new wallets (possibly one entity) withdrew 61.52 million OM (about 3.4% of the total supply) from Binance, with an average price of US$6.82 (US$420 million), and the current unrealized loss is US$14.2 million (-3.39%).

data.title: Federal Reserve's Economic Outlook Suggests Possible Rate Cuts Amid Inflation Concerns
data.description:
According to PANews, 10x Research shared insights on the X platform regarding the Federal Reserve's recent actions. As anticipated, the Fed has lowered its economic growth forecast and slightly slowed the pace of its balance sheet reduction, known as quantitative tightening (QT). Although these measures are not as dovish as the market had hoped, they still lean towards a dovish stance. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell reinforced this tone during a post-meeting press conference, emphasizing that the recent rise in inflation might be temporary, while long-term inflation expectations remain stable. This suggests that the Fed may maintain its current stance in the coming months.

The acknowledgment of weak economic growth by the Fed, coupled with downplaying inflation concerns, indicates an increasing likelihood of rate cuts. The prevailing view is that the Fed will keep interest rates unchanged until September, with the announced QT slowdown providing some support. However, persistent risks may limit the potential for risk assets to rise significantly after an initial rebound. Traders should differentiate between short-term tactical bullish positions and a more cautious mid-term outlook. As long as Bitcoin remains below the resistance zone of $90,000-$92,000, the market may continue to consolidate.

With U.S. President Donald Trump expected to announce tariff policies on April 2 and the U.S. corporate earnings season beginning around April 11, major investors may adopt a wait-and-see approach. There is little evidence to suggest that retail traders are re-entering the market or viewing Powell's recent dovish remarks as a buying opportunity. Market structure indicators remain subdued, indicating that this rebound is unlikely to gain significant momentum or restore Bitcoin to a broader bullish sentiment.

data.title: Deribit: Traders focus on XRP options trading expiring on March 28, and the number of open contracts of ITM call options currently ranks first
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: As the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission withdrew its appeal against Ripple, XRP's market value once surpassed Tether. Currently, XRP's price remains stable in the $2.4 range. Deribit options data shows that traders are paying close attention to and actively participating in options trading expiring on March 28, among which ITM call options have the largest number of open contracts.

data.title: The total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$6.789 billion, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$2.436 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News SoSoValue data shows that yesterday (March 20, Eastern Time) the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 12.4093 million US dollars.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was BlackRock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net outflow of 8.9566 million US dollars. Currently, ETHA has a total net inflow of 4.085 billion US dollars.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net outflow of 3.4528 million US dollars. Currently, FETH has a total net inflow of 1.411 billion US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 6.789 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.84%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.436 billion US dollars.

data.title: LBank market: BUBB and BR both hit new highs, with the highest increases reaching 1093% and 240% respectively
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank market shows that BUBB rose above 0.029 USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.0293 USDT, and is now quoted at 0.02 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 672%. Since its launch on LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 1093%, and the current market value is about 19.82 million US dollars.
BR rose above 0.2 USDT, reaching a maximum of 0.203 USDT, and is now quoted at 0.191 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 218%. Since its launch on LBank, the current maximum increase has reached 240%, and the current market value is about 39.8 million US dollars.
